summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Veteris SaaS landing page completed. All 18 features in the request were verified through Playwright on the public preview URL. Zero console errors, zero page errors, full Spanish content, all CTA toasts, pricing switch, metrics countup, feature spotlight, product tour tabs, FAQ accordion, header backdrop blur on scroll, and mobile hamburger menu all work as specified.

issues: Minor: header keeps backdrop-blur-xl + bg-background/75 class even after scrolling back to top (window.scrollTo(0,0)); the scroll listener does not always re-fire setScrolled(false) when programmatically scrolled to 0. On real user scroll-up this looked fine in screenshots but consider verifying scroll event de-bounce / initial state. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: Hero parallax uses framer-motion useTransform on y/scale/rotate of the dashboard mockup — correctly implemented with will-change-transform. Confirmed structurally; visual parallax is hard to assert in headless but no console warnings from framer-motion.
SpotlightCard uses CSS variables (--mx, --my) updated via onMouseMove with a radial-gradient overlay — verified the radial-gradient is present in the rendered DOM on hover.
ctaToast(kind) in /app/frontend/src/lib/cta.js cleanly maps trial/demo/sales/login → all sonner toasts confirmed in Spanish with correct copy.
Pricing default state is yearly=true, which matches expected $24/$49/$99 default; toggling to monthly correctly shows $29/$59/$119.
useCountUp hook with IntersectionObserver works: metric-0..3 end at exact target values 68%, 3.4x, +24%, 99.9% after ~1.8s animation.
All 8 feature cards (feature-card-0..7) have data-testid; all CTA buttons across hero/nav/pricing/final-cta have data-testid as documented.
Mobile Sheet menu shows all 5 nav links plus 'Iniciar sesión' and 'Probar gratis' buttons at 390px viewport.
Toaster is mounted at App.js position='bottom-right' richColors — confirmed via screenshot. Spanish content is comprehensive; no English copy detected on the page.
test_credentials: N/A (no auth required - static landing page)
seed_data_creation: None - landing page is fully static
context_for_next_testing_agent: Veteris landing page is static (no backend). All CTAs use sonner toasts via ctaToast(kind) in /app/frontend/src/lib/cta.js. When testing toasts, prefer polling for substring across [data-sonner-toast] elements (multiple toasts may be in DOM at once and earlier-appended elements may be older toasts still fading out). Use wait_for_toast_text helper pattern. Pricing switch defaults to yearly=true. Metrics countup animation duration is ~1.8s so wait 2.5s+ after scroll into view. Mobile menu uses shadcn Sheet with role='dialog'. Hamburger button has aria-label='Abrir menú'.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. The page passed all 18 specified test cases. Initial test run had a false negative on hero-demo toast because the test was reading nth(count-1) toast which selected an older lingering trial toast; corrected by polling for substring match across all visible toasts. Re-test confirmed all toasts fire correctly with proper Spanish copy.
verified_features: Hero H1 exactly: 'Toda tu clínica veterinaria, conectada en una sola plataforma.'
[data-testid=scroll-progress] fixed top-0 with scaleX growing on scroll (matrix(0.148..., 0, 0, 1, 0, 0) at scrollY=1500)
Hero parallax: dashboard wrapper uses framer-motion useTransform on y/scale/rotate based on scrollYProgress
hero-trial-btn → success toast '¡Genial! Te estamos preparando tu prueba.'
hero-demo-btn → neutral toast 'Reservemos una demo a tu medida'
feature-card-0..7 have spotlight radial-gradient overlay on hover
pricing-cta-esencial/profesional → trial toast, pricing-cta-grupo → sales toast ('Hablemos de tu cadena')
final-cta-trial-btn → trial toast, final-cta-demo-btn → demo toast
FAQ accordion toggles data-state from closed→open→closed
Header gains backdrop-blur-xl + bg-background/75 on scroll
Mobile 390px: hamburger opens Sheet with Funciones/Producto/Cómo funciona/Precios/FAQ + Iniciar sesión + Probar gratis
100% Spanish content; no English strings detected
